                GpuFilterExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=36, estimate_input_bytes=20, estimate_output_bytes=16, estimate_cost=36
                  GpuScanExec: row_width=20, subtree_max_row_bytes=20, estimate_input_bytes=0, estimate_output_bytes=20, estimate_cost=20
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=40, estimate_input_bytes=24, estimate_output_bytes=16, estimate_cost=40
        GpuCoalescePartitionsExec: row_width=24, subtree_max_row_bytes=40, estimate_input_bytes=24, estimate_output_bytes=24, estimate_cost=48
          GpuAggregateExec: row_width=24, subtree_max_row_bytes=40, estimate_input_bytes=16, estimate_output_bytes=24, estimate_cost=40
            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=36, estimate_input_bytes=16, estimate_output_bytes=16, estimate_cost=32
              GpuFilterExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=36, estimate_input_bytes=20, estimate_output_bytes=16, estimate_cost=36
                GpuScanExec: row_width=20, subtree_max_row_bytes=20, estimate_input_bytes=0, estimate_output_bytes=20, estimate_cost=20
